sections.title: Currently Tested
sections.content:
| Module | Tests | Coverage |
|--------|-------|---------|
| `src/lib/bangs.ts` | `bangs.test.ts` | `resolveBang` — basic paths |
| `src/lib/search.ts` | `search.test.ts` | `normalizeSearchQuery`, `formatDisplayUrl` |
| `src/lib/server/ratelimit.ts` | `ratelimit.test.ts` | `consumeTokenBucket` — basic paths |

sections.title: Completely Untested Modules
sections.content:
- `src/lib/datetime.ts` — `formatDate`, `formatTime`, `formatDateTime`
- `src/lib/stock.ts` — `detectStockTerm`
- `src/lib/server/altcha.ts` — `createChallenge`, `verifySolution`
- `src/lib/server/security.ts` — all 5 exported functions
- `src/lib/server/ai.ts` — `isAiAnswerEnabled`, `getCachedAnswer`, `setCachedAnswer`, `summarizeResults`
- `src/hooks.server.ts` — security header handler, favicon redirect, charset injection

---

sections.title: 1. `src/lib/datetime.ts` — zero coverage
2. `src/lib/stock.ts` — zero coverage
3. `src/lib/server/altcha.ts` — zero coverage
4. `src/lib/server/security.ts` — zero coverage
5. `src/lib/server/ai.ts` — zero coverage
6. Missing edge cases in existing test files
`bangs.test.ts` gaps
`ratelimit.test.ts` gaps
Summary of Gaps by Priority
sections.content:
| Priority | Module | Gap |
|----------|--------|-----|
| High | `altcha.ts` | Replay, expiry, tamper — security-critical paths with zero coverage |
| High | `security.ts` | All state transitions untested; directly guards search access |
| High | `ai.ts` | Error/timeout paths; also LRU eviction logic |
| Medium | `datetime.ts` | Midnight/noon edge cases cause real display bugs; full zero coverage |
| Medium | `stock.ts` | Stopword guard logic is easy to regress; zero coverage |
| Low | `bangs.ts` | Bang-only query, special chars in term |
| Low | `ratelimit.ts` | Partial-interval and retryAfterSeconds precision |
